privileged_info_summary: The CNN Neural Network Visualization task uses SimpleNet-V2, a synthetic convolutional neural network with 8 layers (input, 2 Conv2D, 2 MaxPooling2D, 1 Flatten, 2 Dense). All required dimension labels (32x32x3, 28x28x32, 14x14x32, 12x12x64, 6x6x64, 2304, 128, 10) correspond exactly to the model's output shapes. The task specifies three color codes: blue (#dae8fc) for convolutional layers, red (#f8cecc) for pooling layers, and green (#d5e8d4) for dense layers. Output files are saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/cnn_architecture.drawio (editable diagram) and /home/ga/Diagrams/cnn_architecture.pdf (exported figure). The model summary is created dynamically at /home/ga/Desktop/model_summary.txt during task setup.
